hero.title: Your Strategic Legal Partner
hero.description: Excellence in legal counsel for individuals, businesses and organizations. Expertise in business law, international arbitration and regulatory compliance.
hero.quote: Don't let your way of making a living corrupt your reason for living.

about.title: Legal Expertise in Service of Your Interests
about.description: Yombi Consulting is an online and in-person legal consulting firm specializing in strategic counsel, business law and international support. Founded by Dr. Yombi Rothence Parfait, the firm delivers high-quality legal services.
about.description2: Our approach combines legal rigor, deep knowledge of comparative law systems and practical expertise to provide our clients with solutions tailored to their specific needs.

services.title: Comprehensive Legal Solutions
services.description: We offer a complete range of legal services for individuals, businesses and international organizations.

items.title: Strategic Legal Counsel
items.description: High-level advice for individuals, businesses and international organizations.

items.title: Business Law
items.description: Creation, structuring and legal management of national and international companies.

items.title: Contract Drafting
items.description: Drafting, analysis and negotiation of commercial contracts and international partnerships.

items.title: International Arbitration
items.description: Resolution of commercial disputes between companies from different countries.

items.title: Legal Mediation
items.description: Management and amicable resolution of complex disputes without court proceedings.

items.title: Audit & Compliance
items.description: Complete analysis of corporate compliance with local and international laws.

items.title: Mergers & Acquisitions
items.description: Legal support for buying, selling or merging companies.

items.title: Risk Management
items.description: Identification, prevention and management of legal risks for organizations.

items.title: Legal Training
items.description: Training and awareness sessions on legal matters for teams and executives.

items.title: Investment Protection
items.description: Legal security for national and international investments.

items.title: Labor Law
items.description: Advice and support on labor law and workplace relations.

items.title: Civil & Patrimonial Law
items.description: Advice on civil law as well as estate and asset protection.

whyChooseUs.title: Legal Excellence at Your Service
whyChooseUs.description: Discover what makes Yombi Consulting the preferred legal partner for our clients.

reasons.title: International Expertise

reasons.title: Personalized Approach

reasons.description: Strict professional secrecy and data confidentiality.

banner.footer: Available Monday to Saturday • Response guaranteed within 24h

members.name: Dr. Yombi Rothence Parfait
members.bio: Doctor of Law, specialized in international business law, arbitration, strategic counsel, conflict management, border governance and migration. Extensive multidisciplinary experience with companies, institutions and international organizations. Office located in Libreville, Malibé 2.

members.name: Ovono Zouga Stella Marlyse
members.bio: Deputy Director of Yombi Consulting, Ovono Zouga Stella Marlyse ensures the operational and strategic coordination of the firm.

chatbot.welcome: 👋 Hello! I'm Yombi Consulting's virtual assistant. How can I help you? Ask a question or pick one of the suggestions below.

faqs.question: What are your services?
faqs.answer:
Yombi Consulting offers a full range of legal services:

⚖️ **Strategic Legal Counsel** — for individuals, businesses and international organizations.

🏢 **Business Law** — company creation and legal management.

📄 **Contract Drafting** — commercial contracts and international partnerships.

🌍 **International Arbitration** — resolution of commercial disputes.

🤝 **Legal Mediation**, **Audit & Compliance**, **Mergers & Acquisitions**, **Risk Management**, plus Legal Training, Labor Law and Civil & Patrimonial Law.

Would you like more details on any of these services?

faqs.question: How much does a consultation cost?
faqs.answer: The initial consultation fee is **$50 USD**. Pricing for full engagements is then set on a quote basis, after review of your case.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: Our office is located in **Libreville, Malibé 2, Gabon**. We support both local and international clients, online or in person.

faqs.question: How can I contact you?
faqs.answer:
You can reach us via:

📧 **Email**: yombirothence@gmail.com
💬 **WhatsApp**: +1 234 450 3415
📞 **Phone**: +1 234 450 3415

Or book directly through the appointment form on our site — we respond within 24h, Monday to Saturday.

faqs.question: Who is Dr. Yombi Rothence Parfait?
faqs.answer: Dr. Yombi Rothence Parfait is the **Founder and Principal Legal Consultant** of Yombi Consulting. A Doctor of Law, he specializes in international business law, arbitration, strategic counsel, conflict management, border governance and migration. He is also the author of several books on law, politics, culture and human development.
